examples: Using Meso-piezoresistance effect of RTD as the principle of a novel accelerometer inthe first.
Silicon piezoresistance transducer is a new type pressure sensor which has smaller size, higher frequency response and other advantages.
BP93420D-II is made of HT20 piezoresistance differential pressure sensor and integrated circuit. has capability of high precision, good stability, high reliability and good sensibility.
